kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: At least one of the artisan with 2 coins and the artisan with 6 coins belongs to the South Side.
Mason goes with Beatrix if and only if Riverside does not go with 5 coins.
No members of the Clothiers' Guild are in the Hill Ward.
Either Kingsford goes with 7 coins or someone in the Market Ward goes with 7 coins.
Aldric, Fletcher, and Highrow go with 2 coins, 4 coins, and 7 coins, in some order.
The Fletcher's levy is lower than both Aldric and the artisan in Eastcheap.
Exactly one of Rowan and the artisan with 2 coins belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
If Carpenter goes with Eastcheap, then either Riverside goes with Mason or 6 coins goes with Eastcheap.
At least one member of the Clothiers' Guild goes with (Kingsford or Riverside).
Either Aldric goes with Kingsford, or Matilda goes with 6 coins — but not both.
5 coins goes with at least one of Wulfric or Kingsford.
Between Beatrix and Southgate, one goes with Tanner and the other with 2 coins.
Blacksmith goes with exactly two of Matilda, Highrow, and 3 coins.

Suppose Aldric went with 3 coins — following the clues from there hits a contradiction, so it doesn't.
chain: Start by assuming Aldric goes with 3 coins.
Aldric goes with 3 coins, so it can't also go with 4 coins.
Aldric goes with 3 coins, so it can't also go with 7 coins.
…but now the clue “Aldric, Fletcher, and Highrow go with 2 coins, 4 coins, and 7 coins, in some order” can no longer hold — a contradiction.
So Aldric does not go with 3 coins.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: At least one of the catch with 4 lb and the catch with 8 lb belongs to the West Watershed.
Catfish goes with Cody if and only if Stillwater does not go with 7 lb.
No members of the Sunfish Family are in the West Watershed.
Either Pinehollow goes with 9 lb or someone in the North Watershed goes with 9 lb.
Boone, Carp, and Grayreach go with 4 lb, 6 lb, and 9 lb, in some order.
The angler who landed the Carp's weight is lower than both Boone and the angler at Cedarmere.
Exactly one of Royce and the catch with 4 lb belongs to the Pike Family.
If Bluegill goes with Cedarmere, then either Stillwater goes with Catfish or 8 lb goes with Cedarmere.
At least one member of the Sunfish Family goes with (Pinehollow or Stillwater).
Either Boone goes with Pinehollow, or Esther goes with 8 lb — but not both.
7 lb goes with at least one of Wade or Pinehollow.
Between Cody and Willowmere, one goes with Perch and the other with 4 lb.
Bass goes with exactly two of Esther, Grayreach, and 5 lb.
